  • Uses of ReactiveDiscoveryClient in org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery.composite.reactive

    Classes in org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery.composite.reactive that implement ReactiveDiscoveryClient
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ReactiveCompositeDiscoveryClient
    A ReactiveDiscoveryClient that is composed of other discovery clients and delegates calls to each of them in order.

    Class

    class 
    SimpleReactiveDiscoveryClient
    A ReactiveDiscoveryClient that will use the properties file as a source of service instances.
